title: Go with the Clouds, North by Northwest Manga Gets TV Anime
content: A new official website opened on Wednesday to announce that Aki Irie 's Go with the Clouds, North by Northwest ( Hokuhokusei ni Kumo to Yuke ) manga is getting a television anime. The website shared a commemorative illustration from Irie: Vertical licensed the manga in 2018.
author: ANN

title: Kagurabachi Star Breaks Silence on Leading New Anime as Chihiro
content: Kagurabachi is finally making the leap from the pages of Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine to anime at last, and the main star behind it all has broken their silence about joining the production.
author: ComicBook

title: Miraculous: Highly Anticipated Spin-Off Series Canceled
content: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir has been gaining popularity since its premiere in 2015, with the titular characters fighting crime while creating an empire. With six seasons consisting of over one hundred and fifty episodes, the animated franchise from Miraculous Corps has found numerous ways to expand.
author: ComicBook

title: The Irregular at Magic High School: Yotsuba Succession Arc Film Unveils Video Clip of Miyuki
content: Aniplex began streaming on Tuesday a clip for Mahōka Kōkō no Rettōsei: Yotsuba Keishō-hen ( T he Irregular at Magic High School THE MOVIE - Yotsuba Succession Arc - ) anime film featuring Miyuki Shiba: The film had a premiere screening on April 28 at Shinjuku Wald 9 .
author: ANN

title: 'Clevatess II' Reveals Additional Cast, Ending Theme, Second Promo
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Yuji Iwahara 's Clevatess: Majuu no Ou to Akago to Shikabane no Yuusha ( Clevatess ) manga revealed additional cast, ending theme, second key visual (pictured), and a second promotional video for the second season on Tuesday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Attack on Titan Creator Returns with Surprise Star Wars Crossover
content: Hajime Isayama might have ended the legendary manga known as Attack on Titan , but the mangaka is far from finished when it comes to creating new art. While the Scout Regiment creator has returned to his beloved universe via short stories, such as Attack on Titan: Bad Boy , the artist is more than happy to expand his…
author: ComicBook

title: Manga Creator Mikio Yoshimori Dies Due to Lymphoma at 84
content: Manga creator Mikio Yoshimori's son Daisuke Yoshimori announced on Monday that his father died early in the morning last Friday, April 24 due to lymphoma. He was 84. His relatives plan to hold a private funeral.
author: ANN

title: One Piece Has Finally Begun Exploring Its Most Important Connection (And It Could Be the Series’ Best)
content: One Piece ’s latest chapter, while featuring an important clash, also reveals crucial details that hint at the series’s most important connection. On the surface, the narrative centers on pirates fighting against the World Government.
author: ComicBook

title: Kagurabachi Anime Trailer Exceeds 6 Million Views in Under 24 Hours
content: The trailer for the newly-announced KAGURABACHI anime adaptation has surpassed 6 million views in under 24 hours on the official platforms. The long-awaited anime announcement arrived on April 27 , alongside the production details.
author: Anime Corner

title: Shaula Introduces Herself in Re:ZERO Season 4 Episode 4 Preview
content: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 has revealed the Episode 4 (Episode 70 overall) preview ahead of its April 29, 2026 premiere. Season 4 began on April 8 and ranked first in all three our weekly polls of the season so far . Studio WHITE FOX is animating.
author: Anime Corner
